name: Prometheus X Research & Replies Operator
description: Operating playbook for the prometheus-x-research-replies scheduled job: always read memory first, try x_search for fresh AI/tech angles, fallback to browser automation with x-browser-automation-playbook skill if x_search fails, prepare 2 natural replies + 1 original post with no em dashes and human tone, post via browser from @raulinvests, send Telegram screenshot proof, log to memory, and always close browser with browser_close at the end. Prevents duplicates and CDP issues.
